label: About Me
heading:
"Obsessed with
craft & detail"
paragraph1: I'm a full-stack JavaScript developer focused on building scalable web applications with clean architecture, maintainable code, and strong user experience. I enjoy working across both frontend and backend to turn ideas into complete, production-ready products.
paragraph2: I build responsive and performant interfaces using modern frontend tools, while also designing and implementing backend systems, APIs, authentication flows, and database structures that power real-world applications.
paragraph3: Outside of development, I focus on improving system design understanding, exploring backend architecture patterns, and refining the way I build scalable and efficient software systems.
